SEARCH

所有程序包的分层结构

程序包分层结构:
  • controller,
  • controller.Impl,
  • model,
  • util,
  • view,
  • view.Impl

类分层结构

  • java.lang.Object
    • controller.Impl.AccountBookControllerImpl
    • controller.Impl.AccountBookControllerImpl.CSVUtils
    • view.Impl.AccountBookUiImpl
    • controller.Impl.AIAnalyzeControllerImpl
    • view.Impl.AIAnalyzeUiImpl (implements view.AIAnalyzeUi)
    • view.Impl.BaseUiImpl (implements view.BaseUi)
    • java.awt.Component (implements java.awt.image.ImageObserver, java.awt.MenuContainer, java.io.Serializable)
      • java.awt.Container
        • java.awt.Window (implements javax.accessibility.Accessible)
          • java.awt.Frame (implements java.awt.MenuContainer)
            • javax.swing.JFrame (implements javax.accessibility.Accessible, javax.swing.RootPaneContainer, javax.swing.WindowConstants)
              • main
    • model.CSVImporter
    • util.DeepseekClassify
    • model.Entry
    • controller.Impl.ImportControllerImpl
    • view.Impl.ImportUiImpl (implements view.ImportUi)
    • util.MD5Util
    • controller.Impl.ReportFormsControllerImpl (implements controller.ReportFormsController)
    • view.Impl.ReportFormsUiImpl (implements view.ReportFormsUi)
    • controller.Impl.SettingControllerImpl (implements controller.SettingController)
    • view.Impl.SettingUiImpl
    • java.lang.Throwable (implements java.io.Serializable)
      • java.lang.Exception
        • controller.Impl.showException
    • controller.Impl.UserControllerImpl
    • model.UserModel

接口分层结构

  • view.AccountBookUi
  • view.AIAnalyzeUi
  • view.BaseUi
  • controller.ImportController
  • view.ImportUi
  • controller.ReportFormsController
  • view.ReportFormsUi
  • controller.SettingController
  • view.SettingUi
  • controller.UserController

记录类分层结构

    • java.lang.Record
      • controller.Impl.AccountBookControllerImpl.ProcessedDates
